mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM official_sermon S WHERE S.is_deleted = FALSE
AND S.worship_type = #{worshipType}
AND S.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND S.content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND S.author_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND S.worship_type = #{keyword}
AND (S.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR S.content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT CAST(S.sermon_id AS VARCHAR) AS rqstNo , S.title AS title , S.content_html AS cont , S.author_id AS rqstId , S.preacher_name AS preacherName , S.scripture_reference AS scriptureReference , S.sermon_date AS sermonDate , S.worship_type AS worshipType , S.created_at AS insDt , S.updated_at AS uptDt , S.view_count AS views , NULL AS groupNo , NULL AS parentNo , 0 AS depth , 0 AS orderNo , CASE WHEN S.is_secret THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS secret , S.password_hash AS password , 'SERMONS' AS boardType , (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM com_file F WHERE F.pgm_id = 'sermon' AND F.ref_id = CAST(S.sermon_id AS VARCHAR) AND F.is_deleted = FALSE) AS hasFile FROM official_sermon S WHERE S.sermon_id = #{rqstNo} AND S.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE official_sermon SET view_count = COALESCE(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE sermon_id = #{rqstNo} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO official_sermon ( title, content_html, content_text, author_id, preacher_name, scripture_reference, sermon_date, worship_type, is_secret, password_hash, status, ai_language_code, ai_ready, parent_no, group_no, depth, order_no, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{cont}, REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(#{cont}, ''), '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), #{rqstId}, #{preacherName}, #{scriptureReference}, NULLIF(#{sermonDate}, '')::date, #{worshipType}, CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{secret}, 'N') = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, #{password}, 'PUBLISHED', 'ko', FALSE, #{parentNo}, #{groupNo}, COALESCE(#{depth}, 0), COALESCE(#{orderNo}, 0), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{rqstId}, ''), 'system'), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{rqstId}, ''), 'system'), NOW(), NOW(), FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE official_sermon SET is_deleted = TRUE , deleted_at = NOW() , updated_at = NOW() WHERE sermon_id = #{sermonId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE official_sermon SET group_no = sermon_id WHERE sermon_id = CAST(#{rqstNo} AS BIGINT) AND is_deleted = FALSE
